typography.pairing_strategy: Awwwards-level unexpected editorial pairing. Elegant, high-contrast serif (Cormorant Garamond) for massive kinetic hero typography and manifesto titles to build luxury/trust. Clean, geometric sans (Manrope) for readability in body text. Technical monospace (JetBrains Mono) for numbers, track labels, and stats to inject the 'cyber/cloud' identity.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-7xl lg:text-8xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tight leading-tight

colors.strategy: Warm cream/off-white backgrounds to signal trust, approachability, and editorial prestige (breaking away from generic dark-mode hacker tropes). Text is deep charcoal, never pure black. Use Teal and Copper strictly for interactions, hover states, data-points, and subtle UI accents like 1px borders or typographic highlights.

surface_styles.cards: Flat solid background (#F4EFEA), sharp edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm), with a delicate 1px border (border-copper/20). Avoid heavy drop shadows; use subtle inner borders or 1px outer strokes.
surface_styles.glass: High-end optical clarity. backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/40 with border-white/60. Used for sticky header.

visual_enhancers.image_treatments: Images must look deliberate. Use 'clipped frames' (sharp rectangles, sometimes with slight aspect ratio clipping or overlapping grids). Apply a subtle sepia or warm filter via CSS, or a mix-blend-mode (multiply) against the cream background to integrate them editorially. Add 'spotlight' gradients (radial-gradient) behind images.

layouts.general: Asymmetrical, editorial grids. Heavy use of negative space. Avoid standard Bootstrap columns.
layouts.spacing_scale: Extremely generous. Sections should have py-24 md:py-32. Elements within grids should use gap-8 to gap-16.

sections.name: Kinetic Hero
sections.description: Massive typography with masked line-by-line reveal on load. A subtle 3D/parallax abstract element (wireframe or floating disk) interacting with the scroll.
components: Framer Motion (y: 100% to 0 with overflow-hidden wrapper)
React Spring Parallax or framer-motion useScroll

sections.name: Numbered Manifesto
sections.description: Vision, Mission, Values. Presented as 'Dossiers'. Huge JetBrains Mono numbers (01, 02) on the left, sticking via position: sticky, while the Cormorant Garamond content scrolls past on the right.
components: Grid layout (cols-12, left span-4, right span-8)

sections.name: Services Deep Dive
sections.description: Cloud Computing, Cyber Security, InfoSec. Presented as an elegant accordion or a staggered bento grid where hovering expands the image/text.
components: Shadcn Accordion (highly customized) or Framer Motion expanding cards

sections.name: Solution Tracks
sections.description: Cloud Security Architect, Tools Implementation, NOC & SOC. A dense, technical grid with monospaced metadata and 1px borders, contrasting with the editorial typography.

sections.name: Technology Partners
sections.description: AWS, Azure, CrowdStrike, etc. A slow, seamless editorial marquee.
components: Grayscale logos with opacity-50, transitioning to full color opacity-100 on hover

sections.name: Stats Counters
sections.description: Projects Complete, Happy Clients, etc. Large numbers counting up when in view.

sections.name: Offices
sections.description: Noida + Bangalore. Editorial photography with precise coordinates and timezones in monospace.
components: Hover image reveal or stacked polaroid style

sections.name: Contact Form
sections.description: Premium interaction. Minimalist inputs (border-bottom only, no background). Floating labels. A magnetic or animated submit button.

motion.scrolling: Lenis must be implemented for momentum scrolling to give a premium feel.
motion.reveals: Every section must have a scroll-triggered reveal. Staggered text (line by line) for headings. Fade up with slight y-translate for body text.
motion.micro_interactions: Magnetic buttons for primary CTAs. Links should have an underline that animates out from the center or left on hover.
motion.hero_animation: Masked text reveal. The text should be wrapped in an overflow-hidden span, and the inner text animates from y: 100% to 0 over 1.2s with a custom cubic-bezier(0.76, 0, 0.24, 1).

3d_libraries.recommendation: Use framer-motion's useScroll for 2.5D parallax effects, or a lightweight TSParticles / custom canvas for the subtle background hero moment. No heavy R3F needed unless specifically building a 3D cloud network, in which case keep it abstract and light.

image_urls.description: Abstract network diagram/cloud structure for parallax hero layer
Modern interior with sunlight streaming through geometric patterns. Use for Bangalore office.
Spacious office interior with urban cityscape. Use for Noida office.
Close-up of modern server unit. Apply a mix-blend-mode: multiply or sepia tone to match the editorial light theme.
Cyber security concept on grunge-style background. Great for Manifesto or Solutions.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Do not use generic fonts (Inter, Roboto). Strictly use Cormorant Garamond, Manrope, and JetBrains Mono. Import them via Google Fonts.
2. Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling at the root level.
3. Build the kinetic hero text reveal meticulously. Wrap lines of text in <span className='overflow-hidden block'> and animate the inner <span> from translateY(100%).
4. Apply the color palette literally. Background must be the warm cream #FDF8F5. Use Teal (#2FADA0) and Copper (#B5623C) only for accents/hover/lines.
5. For images, apply 'editorial' treatments. Never just drop a rounded image. Use sharp corners, 1px borders, or mix-blend-mode filters to integrate them into the cream background.
6. Build a custom slow marquee using react-fast-marquee or CSS animations for the tech partners.
7. Ensure the entire page feels like a single, cohesive, award-winning editorial piece, not a segmented template.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters where appropriate.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). Always add transitions for specific properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. No .App { text-align: center; }.
Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped or sharp) with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯) for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations separate good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on provided image URLs. NEVER use placeholder text/domains.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.
